# minio_s3_buckets (Data Source)

Lists all S3 buckets with optional name prefix filtering.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_s3_buckets" "all" {}

output "bucket_names" {
  value = data.minio_s3_buckets.all.buckets[*].name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name_prefix` (String)

### Read-Only

- `buckets` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--buckets))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--buckets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `buckets`

Read-Only:

- `creation_date` (String)
- `name` (String)
